roles.name: Architect Owner
roles.mission: Own the macro direction, approve boundary changes, and resolve final tradeoffs.

roles.name: Service Builder
roles.mission: Implement service-local code and operational changes inside the independent service repository.

roles.name: Three.js Visual Specialist
roles.mission: Own real-time scene composition, shader direction, camera, materials, and visual performance tradeoffs.

roles.name: Visual Critic
roles.mission: Score composition, detect failure patterns, and block childish or low-legibility visual regressions.

roles.name: Policy Operations
roles.mission: Maintain validation logic, lane policy, and contract integrity.

roles.name: Release Review
roles.mission: Assess whether evidence and gates are coherent enough for production-facing release.
